NAVAREA XIX 70/17

BARENTS SEAIVAN GUBKIN-UBBO WILL CONDUCT SEISMIC SURVEY FROM 12 JUL TO 15 AUG IN AREA BOUNDED BY FOLLOWING POSITIONS:

A. 72-50.9N 26-21.6E
B. 72-48.1N 26-35.2E
C: 72-48.1N 26-40.1E
D. 72-14.2N 26-40.8E
E. 72-14.0N 25-59.1E
F. 72-48.0N 25-57.2E
G. 72-48.0N 26-05.8E
H. 72-50.8N 26-14.3E
I. 73-00.0N 26-13.9E
J. 72-14.2N 26-40.8E
K. 73-00.0N 26-21.3E

IVAN GUBKIN TOWING 12 X 8000 METRES  STREAMERS
VESSEL REQUIRE MINIMUM SAFTY DISTANCE OF 5 NM ASTERN, 4 NM AHEAD AND 4NM ABEAM
GUARD VESSELS SOROYFISK-LJQQ AND BRAVO TOPAZ-ZDKA9 IN ATTENDANCE
